name: Iuliia Grotova
title: Data Scientist
bio: I'm a Data Scientist with a background in astrophysics (PhD) and 5+ years of research experience, with strong analytical thinking and a passion for Universe-scaled challenging tasks. I am proficient in advanced data analysis of large datasets, with a special focus on statistical modeling, time-series analysis, and anomaly detection.
Outside work, I am an enthusiast for health and wellness and am also a certified yoga teacher.
